world.title: Mexico see off Ecuador to break 40-year World Cup curse
world.description: Mexico turned on the style at their iconic Azteca Stadium on Tuesday, brushing Ecuador aside 2-0 to break their World Cup knockout curse dating back 40 years. Mexico had not won a World Cup knockout game since 1986, when they last hosted the tournament.
